creator: fulda@seznam.cz
text:
For some modems using qualcomm MSM chipset (tested on AnyDATA ADU-E100)
need bigger input and output buffer for enabling full speed (<256kbps)

Following patch adding properties hw.usb.ubsa.ibufsize and
hw.usb.ubsa.obufsize for tuning this buffers.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
